name: chr19_19p13_11_SLC25A23_SD
description: 19p13.11 SD region containing SLC25A23 (Ca2+-activated mitochondrial carrier) and adjacent paralog blocks. 19p13.11 is the proximal partner of the recurrent 19p13.11 microdeletion / microduplication CNV mediated by flanking SDs and is part of the broader chr19 SD-enrichment field.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~50-150 kb SD blocks at ~99% identity in direct orientation flanking the recurrent 19p13.11 CNV interval (~700 kb-1 Mb deletion); content includes SLC25A23, NR2C2AP, KLF1 and several ZNF paralogs.
